project_mode.measures: Does grounding in the repo's .know/PROJECT.md improve framing+plan quality vs an ungrounded baseline?
project_mode.requires: A TARGET_REPO that already has a built .know/PROJECT.md. For the overfitting check, run against >=2 different repos.

cases.prompt: Make the riskiest external-state write in this project safer to run before it executes.
Add a --dry-run / preview capability to this project's most destructive command: print exactly what it would do, without doing it.

item_mode.measures: On a genuinely new, ungrounded item, does running the matrix beat going straight to plan; and does the gate correctly SKIP a crisp item (over-framing it is a signal-to-noise failure)?

cases.prompt: Add a notifications system to our app.
Should we price the new plan at $49 or $99?
Convert the timestamps in our API responses from epoch seconds to ISO-8601 UTC strings.
